name: microservices-backend
description: Microservices backend with Node.js, Express, Mongoose and TypeScript

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "cd apps/user-service && npm run build" "cd apps/product-service && npm run build" "cd apps/order-service && npm run build" "cd apps/api-gateway && npm run build"
scripts.start:all: concurrently "cd apps/user-service && npm start" "cd apps/product-service && npm start" "cd apps/order-service && npm start" "cd apps/api-gateway && npm start"

author: MD.Anis Molla
